title: HarnessManifest
description: Index of everything harness:create generated — detected stack, domain boundaries, and all written artifact paths.  Downstream tools and agents can validate manifest fragments independently against this schema.

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of when the manifest was written.

git_sha.description: Short git SHA at generation time, or null when git is unavailable.

git_branch.description: Active git branch at generation time, or null when git is unavailable.

harness_version.description: Version string of the harness-skills package that generated this manifest.

project_root.description: Absolute filesystem path of the project root at generation time.

artifacts.description: All files written during harness creation, in generation order.

manifest_path.description: Repo-relative path to this harness_manifest.json file.

schema_path.description: Repo-relative path to harness_manifest.schema.json placed alongside the manifest.

symbols_index_path.description: Repo-relative path to harness_symbols.json, if generated.

DetectedStack.description: Technology stack inferred from project indicator files.

secondary_languages.description: Additional languages present in the repo.

GeneratedArtifact.description: A single file written (or skipped) during harness generation.

artifact_path.description: Repo-relative path of the generated file.

token_count.description: Approximate LLM token count of the written file, or null if not measured.

overwritten.description: True when a prior version of this file was replaced.
